title: commiphora africana var. africana
intro: Commiphora africana var. africana, also known as African myrrh, is a plant species belonging to the Burseraceae family, characterized by its resinous bark and small, yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of African myrrh include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. African myrrh can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
